metrics.top_terms: closure, boundary-condition, badge, html, falsification, main, section, layer, completion, claim, pages, node, derivation, terminal, observer

sections.title: Closure Layer
sections.text:
Boundary-condition completion and the final closure claim.
::::
:::::: badge-row
::: badge

sections.title: Boundary-condition completion
sections.text:
The framework's terminal claim is that Christianity uniquely closes the boundary-condition system rather than leaving it suspended in regress, brute fact, or observer incompleteness.
::::
:::: {.node .derivation}
::: tag

sections.title: Alternatives fail on one of three fronts
sections.text:
Completeness, uniqueness, or terminal observer closure.
::::
::: card

sections.title: Why this is last
sections.text:
The closure layer is earned only after the foundation, subsystem band, bifurcation chamber, evidence strip, and falsification court have been traversed. Otherwise the conclusion reads like assertion instead of closure.
:::
::: trace

sections.title: Publication use
sections.text:
This page can function as the landing section for a public-facing proof summary, while the other pages serve as drill-down support layers for readers who want to inspect the architecture in detail.
:::
:::::::::
::: footer-nav
[← Falsification](falsification.html)[Return to Overview →](index.html)
:::
::::::::::::::::::

claims.one_sentence_claim: Boundary-condition completion and the final closure claim. :::: :::::: badge-row ::: badge
claims.facts_snapshot: No hard factual terms detected by deterministic pass.
claims.forward_test: If the claim is true, the described pattern should appear where the paper says it should appear.
claims.reverse_test: If the pattern can appear without the proposed framework, the claim should be downgraded or narrowed.
claims.evidence_bar: No explicit evidence marker in sentence.
claims.kill_conditions: Needs an explicit failure case: what observation, logic result, or counterexample would make this claim false?
claims.not_claimed: Does not by itself claim that physics proves theology.
claims.proof_boundary: Current boundary: deterministic pass classifies this as Metaphor, not a final proof.
